scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w hirezy-frontend" "npm run dev -w hirezy-backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w hirezy-backend && npm run build -w hirezy-frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend "npm run start -w hirezy-frontend" "npm run start -w hirezy-backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w hirezy-frontend && npm run lint -w hirezy-backend
